---
title: "Chart of the month"
format: html
---

Each month, we nominate and vote for a chart of month, based on

- Impact
- Novelty
- Clarity
- Aesthetics
- Impact
- General love


Here's a few examples of charts that we have loved in the past:

```{=html}
<script> 
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () { 
  const carousel = document.getElementById('carouselExample'); 
  carousel.addEventListener('slide.bs.carousel', function (event) { 
  
  const iframe = event.relatedTarget.querySelector('iframe');
  
  if (iframe) { 
    const src = iframe.src; 
    iframe.src = src; 
    } 
  }); 
}); 
 </script>

<div id="carouselExample" class="carousel slide" data-bs-theme="dark">
  <div class="carousel-indicators">
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#carouselExample" data-bs-slide-to="0" class="active" aria-current="true" aria-label="Slide 1"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#carouselExample" data-bs-slide-to="1" aria-label="Slide 2"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#carouselExample" data-bs-slide-to="2" aria-label="Slide 3"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#carouselExample" data-bs-slide-to="3" aria-label="Slide 4"></button>
    <button type="button" data-bs-target="#carouselExample" data-bs-slide-to="4" aria-label="Slide 5"></button>
  </div>

  <div class="carousel-inner">

    <div class="carousel-item active">
      <iframe height="544px" width="100%" src="https://www.ons.gov.uk/visualisations/dvc3441/shipping-straits-map/index.html"></iframe>
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item">
      <iframe height="893px" width="100%" src="https://www.ons.gov.uk/visualisations/dvc3437/fig1/index.html"></iframe>
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item">
      <iframe height="666px" width="100%" src="https://www.ons.gov.uk/visualisations/dvc3394/fig07/index.html"></iframe>
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item">
      <iframe height="666px" width="100%" src="https://www.ons.gov.uk/visualisations/dvc2811/fig4wrapper/index.html"></iframe>
    </div>

    <div class="carousel-item">
      <iframe height="544px" width="100%" src="https://www.ons.gov.uk/visualisations/dvc3376/fig1wrapper/"></iframe>
    </div>

  </div>

  <button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#carouselExample" data-bs-slide="prev">
    <span class="carousel-control-prev-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    <span class="visually-hidden">Previous</span>
  </button>

  <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#carouselExample" data-bs-slide="next">
    <span class="carousel-control-next-icon" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    <span class="visually-hidden">Next</span>
  </button>

</div>

```
